steps.title: Spot the temporal shift
steps.content: The past perfect “had served” indicates that Massey's presidency of the Black Physicists organization occurred before his 1990 NSF appointment—the passage shifts backward in time.

steps.title: Match the chronological relationship
steps.content:
”Previously” explicitly marks a prior event, moving backward from the 1990 NSF appointment to Massey's earlier presidency.

The other three choices cannot establish this chronological relationship—”In conclusion” suggests closure, “Thus” suggests consequence, and “For example” suggests contemporary illustration.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
